title: Records
content:
Every employer who employs females shall maintain, in a form 
Last updated date
11.12.2020
Employment Ordinance
Part III	
3-30
Section 15A	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
specified by the Commissioner, a record of maternity leave taken 
by and maternity leave pay paid to his female employees.
(Added 22 of 1981 s. 6)
